verdict.summary: The prior round's major finding is resolved soundly. External FROM references now reject variable expansion and require a literal sha256 digest of exactly 64 hexadecimal characters, while prior-stage aliases remain allowed. The added negative self-tests cover variable-expanded, short, non-hex, and empty digests and would fail under the previous substring-only implementation. The directory-prefix trust-surface expansion remains fail-closed and is backed by non-vacuous classification tests. No blocker or major issue remains in the diff.
